Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperial Guards]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Guards pulled Rojric back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Imperial Guards are a group of soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Imperial Guards are stationed in the corners of the chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Imperial Guards dragged Rojric Marten's body away.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Imperial Guards were waiting against the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Imperial Guards have hunting parties that are sabotaged by Greenwardens.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Imperial Guards were cutting at the Elder wall with weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Wounded Imperial Guards were cleaning up Elderspawn gore in the courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Imperial Guards tend to the Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Imperial Guards are pulling themselves to their feet and calling for backup in the courtyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Guards seized Lucan and leveled weapons at him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Guards have Kameira enhancements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperial Guards were outside the doors when Meia disappeared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Imperial Guards guarding the armory have crocodile-like teeth, muscled arms, and six-fingered hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Imperial Guards leap from ships onto the Gray Island.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Four Imperial Guards stood in front of the gates of Hightower.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — The Imperial Guards wear black and red uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Imperial Guards have enhanced senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Imperial Guards fill the sky during the coronation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Calder was escorted by Imperial Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Imperial Guards responded to Calder's call for guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Bandaged Imperial Guards are tending to the injured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Imperial Guards are standing at the bottom of a ramp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Imperial Guards were cowering by the doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Most Imperial Guards are fighting on Navigator vessels.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Imperial Guards wear red-and-black uniforms and have Kameira limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Imperial Guards were filling the streets below.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
